\tzpentry{ID3456}{Inverse Temperature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3456 introduces Inverse Temperature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{ \lambda_i(t) \;=\; \lambda_0\; S_i(t)\;[1 + \beta\,R_i(t)] } \]
